message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam sequenceMessageSize 100

actor "Admin" as Admin
participant "Sqoop" as Sqoop
database "Metastore DB" as MetastoreDB
package "HDFS" as HDFS
participant "Hive SQL" as HiveSQL
database "Hive" as HiveDB
participant "Hive Table" as HiveTable
participant "Ambari" as Ambari

note right of Admin
  This process should be run several days
  BEFORE the actual upgrade to reduce the downtime
  of the upgrade.

  And should be run just BEFORE the upgrade and
  AFTER all users have been cleared from the system
  to ensure no tables are modified after this runs.
end note

Admin -> Sqoop: Run "Collect the Metadata"
Sqoop -> MetastoreDB: Extracts from
Sqoop -> HDFS: Saves to
Admin -> HiveTable: Run "Build Supporting Tables"

Admin -> HiveTable: Run "Distinct Serdes"
Admin -> HiveTable: Fix Tables with Serde Issues
Admin -> HiveTable: Run "Check Partition Location"
Admin -> HiveTable: Run "Non-Managed Table Locations"
Admin -> HiveTable: Run "Managed Table Locations"
Admin -> HiveTable: Run "Missing HDFS Directories Check"
Admin -> HiveTable: Correct "Missing Directories"
Admin -> HiveTable: Run "Table Migration Check"
Admin -> HiveTable: Run "Acid Table Conversions"
Admin -> HiveTable: Run "Conversion Table Directories"

Admin -> HiveTable: Run "Acid Table Compaction Check"
Admin -> HiveTable: Run "Acid Table Compaction Required"
Admin -> HiveTable: TUNE THE COMPACTOR for estimated compaction needs
Admin -> HiveTable: Run the compaction script. Break it apart if needed.

Admin -> HiveTable: Run "Acid Table Locations". Save artifact for Upgrade.

Admin -> Ambari: Review and Run ALL previous steps and collect details.
Admin -> Ambari: Decision to intervene with Ambari Process based on volumes indicated through research
Admin -> Ambari: Hack Pre/Post Processes
Admin -> Ambari: Run Compaction Routine one last time.
Admin -> Ambari: Start Upgrade
Admin -> Ambari: Run the Post Upgrade Planning Output to convert tables.
Admin -> Ambari: Complete Upgrade

@enduml
